final:
module adc_16_to_4 (
    input [15:0] analog_in,   // 16-bit analog input
    output [3:0] digital_out   // 4-bit digital output
);
    assign digital_out = analog_in / 4096; // Quantization logic
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      digital_out <= analog_in * 4096;
    end
  end

endmodule
